lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਜਨਮੁ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਗਇਆ ਕਿਆ ਮੁਹੁ ਦੇਸੀ ਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: manamukh janam birathaa geaa kiaa muhu desee jaae |3|
lines.english: The life of the self-willed manmukh passes uselessly. What face will he show when he passes beyond? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਕਹਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh aape aap hai haumai vich kehan na jaae |
lines.english: God Himself is everything; those who are in their ego cannot even speak of this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਲਾਗਉ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satagur sevan aapanaa hau tin kai laagau paae |
lines.english: I fall at the feet of those who serve their True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਦੁਖੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad pachhaaneeai dukh haumai vichahu gavaae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He is realized, and the pain of egotism is eradicated from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਚਿਆਰ ਹਹਿ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥੪॥੨੧॥੫੪॥
lines.translit: naanak dar sachai sachiaar heh hau tin balihaarai jaau |4|21|54|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to those who are found to be true in the True Court. ||4||21||54||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਰਤਿਆ ਸਚੇ ਸਚੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin naame ratiaa sache sachee soe |
lines.english: Night and day, one who is attuned to the Name of the True Lord is true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਵੇਲਾ ਵਖਤੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੀਐ ਤਾ ਕਿਤੁ ਵੇਲਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: je velaa vakhat veechaareeai taa kit velaa bhagat hoe |
lines.english: Consider the time and the moment-when should we worship the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਿਨੇਹੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik til piaaraa visarai bhagat kinehee hoe |
lines.english: If someone forgets the Beloved Lord, even for an instant, what sort of devotion is that?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਸਾਚ ਸਿਉ ਸਾਸੁ ਨ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man tan seetal saach siau saas na birathaa koe |1|
lines.english: One whose mind and body are cooled and soothed by the True Lord-no breath of his is wasted. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man har kaa naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate on the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਤਾ ਥੀਐ ਜਾ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saachee bhagat taa theeai jaa har vasai man aae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: True devotional worship is performed when the Lord comes to dwell in the mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਖੇਤੀ ਰਾਹੀਐ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਬੀਜੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje khetee raaheeai sach naam beej paae |
lines.english: With intuitive ease, cultivate your farm, and plant the Seed of the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਤੀ ਜੰਮੀ ਅਗਲੀ ਮਨੂਆ ਰਜਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khetee jamee agalee manooaa rajaa sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: The seedlings have sprouted luxuriantly, and with intuitive ease, the mind is satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਚਿ ਰਤਾ ਸਚੇ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: eihu man saachaa sach rataa sache rahiaa samaae |2|
lines.english: This true mind is attuned to Truth, and it remains permeated with the True One. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਪੀਤੈ ਤਿਖ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad amrit hai jit peetai tikh jaae |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad is Ambrosial Nectar; drinking it in, thirst is quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਰਹਿ ਗਇਆ ਸਚੈ ਲਇਆ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai meraa reh geaa sachai leaa milaae |
lines.english: Egotism and possessiveness are eliminated, and the True One absorbs them into Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣੁ ਵੇਖਣੁ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਸਬਦੇ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aakhan vekhan bolanaa sabade rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: In speaking, in seeing and in words, remain immersed in the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਣੀ ਵਜੀ ਚਹੁ ਜੁਗੀ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਣਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: baanee vajee chahu jugee sacho sach sunaae |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Bani vibrates throughout the four ages. As Truth, it teaches Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਵਿਣੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: nadaree naam dhiaaeeai vin karamaa paaeaa na jaae |
lines.english: By His Grace, we meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. Without His Mercy, it cannot be obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਮਹਲੁ ਹਦੂਰਿ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tin kau mehal hadoor hai jo sach rahe liv laae |3|
lines.english: Those who remain lovingly absorbed in the True One see the Mansion of His Presence close at hand. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਲਹੈ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: poorai bhaag satasangat lahai satagur bhettai jis aae |
lines.english: Through perfect good destiny, one finds the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, and one comes to meet the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੜਾ ਨਾਮੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੪॥੨੨॥੫੫॥
lines.translit: naanak sabad milaavarraa naame naam samaae |4|22|55|
lines.english: O Nanak, merging with the Shabad through the Name, one is immersed in the Name. ||4||22||55||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਰਤਿਆ ਦੁਖੁ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin naame ratiaa dukh bikhiaa vichahu jaae |
lines.english: Night and day, remain attuned to the Naam, and the pain of corruption shall be dispelled from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਭਉ ਤਿਨ ਪਾਇਓਨੁ ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aapanaa bhau tin paaeon jin gur kaa sabad beechaar |
lines.english: Those who contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad are filled with the Fear of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤੀ ਸਦਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੇ ਸਚੇ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: satasangatee sadaa mil rahe sache ke gun saar |
lines.english: They remain forever merged with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation; they dwell upon the Glories of the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਮੈਲੁ ਚੁਕਾਈਅਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: dubidhaa mail chukaaeean har raakhiaa ur dhaar |
lines.english: They cast off the filth of their mental duality, and they keep the Lord enshrined in their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਚੁ ਮਨਿ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sachee baanee sach man sache naal piaar |1|
lines.english: True is their speech, and true are their minds. They are in love with the True One. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਭਰ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: man mere haumai mail bhar naal |
lines.english: O my mind, you are filled with the filth of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੋਹਣਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਵਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har niramal sadaa sohanaa sabad savaaranahaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Immaculate Lord is eternally Beautiful. We are adorned with the Word of the Shabad. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਰਤਿਆ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin naame ratiaa jotee jot samaae |
lines.english: Night and day, they are attuned to the Naam, and their light is absorbed into the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਨੁ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad man mohiaa prabh aape le milaae |
lines.english: God joins to Himself those whose minds are fascinated with the True Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin kau poorab likhiaa satagur bhettiaa tin aae |2|
lines.english: The True Guru comes to meet those who have such pre-ordained destiny. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤੀ ਹੂ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਪਦਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਗੁਰ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jotee hoo prabh jaapadaa bin satagur boojh na paae |
lines.english: Through His Light, God is revealed. Without the True Guru, understanding is not obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੜੀ ਨ ਜੀਵਦੀ ਦੁਖੀ ਰੈਣਿ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin gharree na jeevadee dukhee rain vihaae |
lines.english: Without Him, I cannot survive even for an instant, and my life-night passes in anguish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭ ਡੁਮਣੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: vin naavai sabh ddumanee doojai bhaae khuaae |
lines.english: Without the Name, all are miserable. In the love of duality, they are ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਣੀ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: nadar kare prabh aapanee aape le milaae |3|
lines.english: When God Himself bestows His Glance of Grace, He blends us into Himself. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਣਾ ਅੰਧੁਲਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bharam bhulaanaa andhulaa fir fir aavai jaae |
lines.english: Wandering in doubt, the spiritually blind come and go in reincarnation, over and over again.
